eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Boone, WV; at 4:46 PM on JUL 20, 2026 Effective until 10:46 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: MISSING JUVENILE Siara Dotson  11-year-old female  5 0   80 lbs  brown hair  brown eyes  dark complexion. Last seen near Lick Creek along Little Coal River at approximately 4 30 PM. If seen  call 911 immediately. If seen please dial 911
